seo.defaultTitle: TicketsHub – Buy and Sell Tickets Securely
seo.defaultDescription: Buy and sell event tickets with buyer protection. Find tickets for concerts, sports, and more.

landing.title: TicketsHub – Buy and Sell Tickets Securely
landing.description: Find tickets for concerts, sports, and events with buyer protection. Secure escrow keeps both buyers and sellers safe.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Our secure escrow system protects both buyers and sellers throughout the entire transaction
howItWorks.trustMessage: Buy and Sell with Complete Peace of Mind
howItWorks.trustDesc: Your payment is securely held until the ticket is confirmed and the event takes place. Both parties are protected every step of the way.
howItWorks.step1Desc: You securely pay for the ticket. Your payment is held safely in escrow.
howItWorks.step1Note: Money is protected in our secure escrow system
howItWorks.step2Desc: Seller transfers the ticket to you and confirms the transfer in the system.
howItWorks.step2Note: Seller must confirm transfer before payment is released
howItWorks.step3Desc: You confirm receiving the ticket. Funds remain in escrow until event day.
howItWorks.step3Note: Payment held securely until event completion
howItWorks.step4Desc: After the event, you have 3 days to dispute. If no issues, seller gets paid.
howItWorks.paymentProtectionDesc: Your money is held securely until you confirm receipt
howItWorks.disputeWindowDesc: 3 days after the event to report any issues
howItWorks.verifiedTicketsDesc: All tickets are verified before transfer
howItWorks.sellerRatingsDesc: Review seller history and ratings before purchasing
howItWorks.guaranteedPaymentDesc: Payment is secured before ticket transfer
howItWorks.automaticReleaseDesc: Payment automatically released after dispute window
howItWorks.buildReputationDesc: Earn badges and ratings to attract more buyers
howItWorks.faqQ1: When does the seller receive payment?
howItWorks.faqA1: The seller receives payment 3 days after the event date, provided no disputes are filed. This ensures buyers have time to verify the tickets worked properly.
howItWorks.faqQ2: What if I don't receive my ticket?
howItWorks.faqA2: If the seller doesn't transfer the ticket, don't confirm receipt. Contact our support team and your payment will be refunded immediately.
howItWorks.faqQ3: What if the ticket doesn't work at the event?
howItWorks.faqA3: You have 3 days after the event to file a dispute. Our team will investigate and issue a full refund if the ticket was invalid.
howItWorks.faqQ4: How long does the entire process take?
howItWorks.faqA4: Ticket transfers typically happen within 24 hours. Payment is released to sellers 3 days after the event date, assuming no disputes are filed.
howItWorks.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of buyers and sellers who trust our secure platform for their ticket transactions

promotions.description: Create and manage seller/buyer fee promotions. One promotion per user per type.

promotionCodes.codeMaxUsagesHint: How many users can claim this code. 0 = unlimited.
promotionCodes.editDescription: Update the code target, promotion config, and validity.

platformConfig.title: Platform Settings
platformConfig.description: Configure platform fees and timeouts. Changes apply to new transactions and pricing snapshots.
platformConfig.phoneRequiredEventHours: Require phone when event starts within (hours)
platformConfig.riskEngineDniSubtitle: Require identity (DNI) when triggers are stricter (e.g. event within fewer hours, higher amount). Same condition types as phone.
platformConfig.dniRequiredEventHours: Require DNI when event starts within (hours)
platformConfig.dniNewAccountDays: Require DNI when account age under (days)
platformConfig.phoneRequiredPaymentMethodTypes: Require phone when payment method is
platformConfig.phoneRequiredPaymentMethodTypesHelp: If the buyer selects one of these payment methods, phone verification (V2) is required in addition to other triggers.
platformConfig.dniRequiredPaymentMethodTypes: Require DNI when payment method is
platformConfig.dniRequiredPaymentMethodTypesHelp: If the buyer selects one of these payment methods, identity verification (V3) and phone (V2) are required.
platformConfig.unverifiedSellerMaxAmount: Unverified seller max total value in active listings

validation.buyerFeeBetween: Buyer fee must be between {{min}} and {{max}}.
validation.sellerFeeBetween: Seller fee must be between {{min}} and {{max}}.
validation.paymentTimeoutBetween: Payment timeout must be between {{min}} and {{max}}.
validation.adminReviewBetween: Admin review timeout must be between {{min}} and {{max}}.
validation.chatPollBetween: Chat poll interval must be between {{min}} and {{max}} seconds.
validation.chatMaxBetween: Max chat messages must be between {{min}} and {{max}}.
validation.unverifiedSellerAmountBetween: Unverified seller max amount must be between 0 and 100000.
validation.phoneAmountBetween: Require phone amount must be between 0 and 100000.
validation.dniAmountBetween: Require DNI amount must be between 0 and 100000.
validation.usdToArsBetween: USD to ARS rate must be between 1 and 1000000.

eventsScore.title: Events Score
eventsScore.description: Configure ranking weights and the job cadence for recomputing event scores. Events with published listings are scored by active listings, completed transactions, and proximity to event date.
eventsScore.weightsDescription: Weights for each component of the ranking score. Higher values give more importance to that component.
eventsScore.weightProximity: Weight: proximity to next event date
eventsScore.jobDescription: The job processes the queue of events that need scoring. It runs every minute but only executes when the interval has passed since the last run.
eventsScore.validationRequired: Please enter at least one valid value to save.
eventsScore.queueDescription: Select one or more events to add to the scoring queue. The job will recompute their ranking score on the next run.
